prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年云南省理科/物理类最低位次分别为约3430名→3313名→3233名→2688名→2827名，整体呈波动前移趋势，2024年达到近年最优（2688名），2025年小幅后移至2827名，近两年波动幅度约139名，2025年基准位次为2827名；该校在云南省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年86人、2022年95人、2023年95人、2024年94人、2025年99人、2026年（招生计划文件）108人。2026年较2025年扩招9人（增幅约9.1%），扩招幅度较为明显，对竞争压力有一定缓解作用，但扩招幅度小于考生规模增幅。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安电子科技大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第39–41名（2026年排名第39名），属于信息科技领域顶尖211院校，在电子信息类高校中仅次于电子科技大学，学校层次和行业认可度较高；该校近年声誉评价偏负面：2022年因学生学术不端事件受关注，2025年因校园霸凌事件被提及；抖音热度总排名第60位（较热），综合热度约53万，关键词以“顶级211的压迫感”“IT领域之王”为主，整体关注度中等偏上；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，信息与通信工程A+、电子科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A、网络空间安全A、机械工程A-，共5个A-及以上学科，在电子信息、计算机领域实力突出，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示：电子信息/通信类为高热推荐，计算机类为推荐，电气工程及其自动化高热推荐，该校核心专业均处于高热或偏热状态，对高分考生吸引力强；云南省2026年高考总报名人数约37.79万，按近年物理类占比约60.7%估算，物理类考生约22.9万人，较2025年物理类17.33万人增长约32%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；该校位于陕西省西安市，非云南省本省高校，无本省招生倾斜；在云南省招生计划占比较小（约2–3%），跨省报考受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2827名、2026年扩招9.1%（位次后移约154名）、云南省物理类考生增长约32%（竞争加剧）以及电子信息/计算机类专业持续高热等因素，扩招对竞争有一定缓解但考生规模增长幅度更大，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移。预测最低位次约3011名，区间2559–3463名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（卓越计划实验班）
- 电子信息类（创新实验班）
- 电子信息类（集成电路）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（通信）
- 电子信息类（电子工程）
- 计算机类
- 计算机类（智能）
- 电子信息类（电子科学、信息物理、空天信息）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 计算机类（网络安全）
- 自动化类（智能制造及智能测控）
- 材料类（电子材料与微纳器件）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2559–3463名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底。若位次明显优于区间下限（如2559名以内），可重点冲击卓越计划实验班和创新实验班等顶尖专业；位次在区间中部（约3000名左右）建议以计算机类、电子信息类（通信/电子工程）为核心选择；位次接近区间上限（3463名附近）建议以自动化类和材料类保底。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category in Yunnan Province were approximately 3430 → 3313 → 3233 → 2688 → 2827, showing a fluctuating forward trend overall, reaching the best in recent years in 2024 (2688), with a slight backward shift to 2827 in 2025, and a fluctuation range of about 139 places in the last two years, with a baseline ranking of 2827 in 2025; the enrollment plan for this university in Yunnan Province's science/physics category: 86 in 2021, 95 in 2022, 95 in 2023, 94 in 2024, 99 in 2025, and 108 in 2026 (according to the enrollment plan document). In 2026, compared to 2025, there is an expansion of 9 students (an increase of about 9.1%), which is relatively significant and helps alleviate competition pressure to some extent, but the expansion rate is smaller than the growth rate of the number of examinees.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xidian University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, with a stable ranking of 39–41 in recent years in the Shanghai Ranking (ranked 39th in 2026). It is a top-tier 211 university in the field of information technology, second only to the University of Electronic Science and Technology of China among electronic information universities, with a high university level and industry recognition; in recent years, its reputation evaluation has been somewhat negative: in 2022, it attracted attention due to a student academic misconduct incident, and in 2025, it was mentioned due to a campus bullying incident; its overall popularity on Douyin ranks 60th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 530,000, with keywords mainly being 'the oppressive feeling of a top 211' and 'king of the IT field'; no obvious records of admission cut-off breaks; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Information and Communication Engineering A+, Electronic Science and Technology A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Cyberspace Security A, Mechanical Engineering A-, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above, showing outstanding strength in electronic information and computer fields, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows: Electronic Information/Communication categories are highly recommended, Computer category is recommended, Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended, all core majors of this university are in high or relatively high popularity, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates; the total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Gaokao in Yunnan Province is about 377,900, estimated at about 60.7% physics category based on recent years, resulting in about 229,000 physics category candidates, an increase of about 32% compared to 173,300 in 2025, significantly increasing competition; the university is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, not a local university in Yunnan Province, with no local enrollment preference; its enrollment plan in Yunnan Province accounts for a small proportion (about 2–3%), and cross-province application is limited by regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2827, the 2026 expansion of 9.1% (ranking backward shift of about 154 places), the 32% increase in physics category candidates in Yunnan Province (intensified competition), and the sustained high popularity of electronic information/computer majors, the expansion alleviates competition to some extent but the increase in candidate numbers is larger, so the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to shift slightly backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3011, with a range of 2559–3463.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Electronic Information (Excellence Program Experimental Class)
- Electronic Information (Innovation Experimental Class)
- Electronic Information (Integrated Circuits).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Communication)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Engineering)
- Computer Science
- Computer Science (Intelligent)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Science, Information Physics, Aerospace Information).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Computer Science (Cybersecurity)
- Automation (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Measurement and Control)
- Materials (Electronic Materials and Micro-Nano Devices).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2559–3463, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2559), focus on sprinting for top majors like the Excellence Program Experimental Class and Innovation Experimental Class; if the ranking is in the middle of the range (around 3000), it is recommended to choose Computer Science or Electronic Information (Communication/Electronic Engineering) as core options; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 3463), it is recommended to use Automation and Materials majors as safety options.
